text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day off, I'm in a sports store at the mall
when I come across Silence Suzuka and a few
others.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: All righty! And we're here—the fabled Shangri-la!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What are you on about? Don't you forget, we've
come here to help Suzuka select a new pair of
shoes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Suzuka. Are you picky about anything when
it comes to shoes?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well... I guess my first concern is usually finding
the right size. But that's just a matter of trying
them on...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I prefer them flexible and soft... I like to
feel my feet make contact with the ground, so the
soles should be on the thin side... And then...
Um...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Dang, Suzuka! I knew you'd be part'cular 'bout
your shoes!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Lookit these beauties!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Feast your eyes on this legendary find!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Stop it... Those are clearly roller skates! And
what's with those odd feathers sewn on the
ankles?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... How do you think they're used?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! You don't know what roller skates are?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, that's not what I meant... I was wondering
if they might have any use for training or not.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
C'mon now. Learn to trust your senses. Look at
the feathers. Clearly they're meant to send you
soaring beyond the clouds! Just imagine the
incredible scenery you'd get to see.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Incredible scenery...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Since we're here, you might as well try them
on! Right, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What?! ...Um, yes, I suppose so...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, I'll give them a try.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka skates slowly around the shoe
store. As she turns a corner...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, umm, how am I supposed to stop?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: S-Suzuka?! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that was close! When Suzuka picked up
speed down that slope, then jumped and
performed a triple axel midair, I thought I was
going to faint.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Who knew Suzuka possessed such power... What
fools you are, Spe and McQueen. You've gone
and broken her forbidden seal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! You started it! Good grief... Sorry
about all this, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'm fine. Things got a little hairy, but
it was... entertaining. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank goodness you had fun, then!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. As I thought, there's never a dull moment
with you guys. I really mean it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Let's keep the fun going and continue
our search for Suzuka's perfect shoes!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks. Okay, then. Shall we—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Holy moly! You won't believe it, I've struck gold
again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Which can only mean you've found some other
oddity—oh wait, those look rather nice.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, duh. Everyone knows that when shopping
for shoes, you're supposed to choose something
flexible, soft, and with soles on the thin side.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What?! You just repeated what Suzuka said in the
beginning, word for word!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Suzuka, come here for a second! I found
these in just the right size—oh, and they have
carrot decals!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Okay, I'm coming.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Look at all the choices I have... I'd never have
noticed this many if I came here alone. But thanks
to you all...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now I'm curious to try them on. I wonder
what kind of scenery I'll be able to see... running
with the shoes everyone chose.
